rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Tests that reference internal spy refs like `_gradebookSpyRef` on a module will fail if that property was never exported — always verify the property actually exists on the module before using it in t","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When a spy ref is unavailable, the correct substitute is calling the actual service method directly (e.g., `PayloadGradebookService.getStudentGradebook()`) rather than trying to patch a non-existent e","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Payload service methods are accessed via the class itself, not via module-level spy references — prefer direct class instantiation or static method calls in test setup.","scope":"src/services/payload"}]}
